div.p: Transaction T1 with UPDATEs at LSN 100, 150, 200 Crash during undo → CLR enables resumption

ul.li: undo_next_lsn = 150 (points to next record to undo) Recovery follows undo_next_lsn, not prev_lsn:
prev_lsn would lead back to 200 (already undone!)
undo_next_lsn leads to 150 (correct next step) Without CLRs, recovery would re-undo LSN 200, potentially corrupting data or causing infinite loops.
